_comment: No-show risk scoring configuration (AIR-006, AIR-O04). All weights are normalized so that a patient who never shows up scores 100 and a patient with a perfect attendance history scores near 0.

fallback.comment: Scores produced via rule-based fallback are marked isEstimated=true (AC-3).

guardrails.comment: Scores are clamped to [0,100]. Scores >= 70 set outreach flag (EC-2).

circuitBreaker.comment: AIR-O04: open after 5 consecutive failures; retry after 30 seconds.

audit.comment: AIR-S01/NFR-017: log score band and path (classification vs fallback). Never log raw patient history values or identifiers.
